name: Monthly Target Report - All
query:
SELECT
   C.sales_person AS "Sales Person:Link/Sales Person",
   C.division AS "Division",
   C.name AS "Customer:Link/Customer",
   C.customer_name AS "Customer Name",

   -- Full Year Target
   (
      SELECT SUM(
         COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) +
         COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0) +
         COALESCE(YTD.oct, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.nov, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.dec, 0) +
         COALESCE(YTD.jan, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.feb, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.mar, 0)
      )
      FROM `tabSales Person Yearly Target Details` YTD
      LEFT JOIN `tabYearly Target` YT ON YT.name = YTD.parent
      WHERE YTD.customer = C.name AND YT.fiscal_year = %(fiscal_year)s
   ) AS "TargetFullYear:Currency",

   -- YTD Target based on the month
   (
      SELECT
      CASE
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 4 THEN 0
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 5 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 6 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 7 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 8 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 9 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 10 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 11 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.oct, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 12 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.oct, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.nov, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 1 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.oct, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.nov, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.dec, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 2 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.oct, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.nov, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.dec, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jan, 0)))
         WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 3 THEN ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(YTD.apr, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.may, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jun, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jul, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.aug, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.sep, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.oct, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.nov, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.dec, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.jan, 0) + COALESCE(YTD.feb, 0)))
         ELSE 0
      END
      FROM `tabSales Person Yearly Target Details` YTD
      LEFT JOIN `tabYearly Target` YT ON YT.name = YTD.parent
      WHERE YTD.customer = C.name AND YT.fiscal_year = %(fiscal_year)s
   ) AS "YTD TARGET:Currency",

   -- YTD ACTUAL
   (
      SELECT SUM(SI.net_total)
      FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI
      INNER JOIN `tabSales Team` ST ON ST.parent = SI.name
      WHERE SI.company = %(company)s
        AND C.name = SI.customer
        AND SI.posting_date BETWEEN
           (SELECT year_start_date FROM `tabFiscal Year` WHERE name = %(fiscal_year)s)
           AND %(date)s
        AND SI.docstatus = 1
   ) AS "YTD ACTUAL:Currency",

   -- Previous Month Target
   (
      SELECT MAX(MTD.amount)
      FROM `tabMonthly Target` MT
      LEFT JOIN `tabMonthly Target Details` MTD ON MT.name = MTD.parent
      WHERE MT.company = %(company)s
        AND MT.month = MONTHNAME(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 MONTH))
        AND MT.year = (CASE WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 1 THEN YEAR(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) ELSE YEAR(%(date)s) END)
        AND MTD.customer = C.name
   ) AS "PREVIOUSMONTHTARGET",

   -- Previous Month Actual
   (
      SELECT SUM(SI.total)
      FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI
      INNER JOIN `tabSales Team` ST ON ST.parent = SI.name
      WHERE SI.company = %(company)s
        AND C.name = SI.customer
        AND MONTH(SI.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 MONTH))
        AND YEAR(SI.posting_date) = (CASE WHEN MONTH(%(date)s) = 1 THEN YEAR(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) ELSE YEAR(%(date)s) END)
        AND SI.docstatus = 1
   ) AS "PREVIOUS MONTH ACTUAL:Currency",

   -- Current Month Target
   (
      SELECT MAX(MTD.amount)
      FROM `tabMonthly Target` MT
      LEFT JOIN `tabMonthly Target Details` MTD ON MT.name = MTD.parent
      WHERE MT.company = %(company)s
        AND MT.docstatus = 1
        AND MT.month = MONTHNAME(%(date)s)
        AND MT.year = YEAR(%(date)s)
        AND MTD.customer = C.name
   ) AS "CURRENTMONTHTARGET",

   -- Current Month Actual
   (
      SELECT SUM(SI.net_total)
      FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI
      INNER JOIN `tabSales Team` ST ON ST.parent = SI.name
      WHERE SI.company = %(company)s
        AND C.name = SI.customer
        AND MONTH(SI.posting_date) = MONTH(%(date)s)
        AND YEAR(SI.posting_date) = YEAR(%(date)s)
        AND SI.docstatus = 1
   ) AS "CURRENT MONTH ACTUAL:Currency"

FROM `tabCustomer` C
WHERE C.company = %(company)s AND C.sales_person != 'Sales Team'
GROUP BY C.name, C.sales_person
